verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I owe my life to Jesus If I had many more I would give them all to Him I owe my whole life to Jesus If I had a thousand more, that's still not enough I'd live them all for Him

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He did not hesistate to do this work fo me. My kinsman redeemer, He bought full and complete redemption He considered the cost, what it would take to free my soul Came down from his glory and made a way back to the tree of life

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I count the cost of what Jesus did for me I count the cost of what Jesus did for me at calvary I count the cost as He left His home in glory, redemption story just for me I count the cost as He left His throne on high, came down to die just for me.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Like Ruth coming out of a broken, barren land, I came into the house of God's bread Though I be a stranger, I followed the voice inside I was instructed, to the feet of the one who would change my life

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So I laid my claim upon the word which I was taught With all my heart I believe for He hath proven faithful before And He promised that He would not rest until it's done He did exactly as was promised Oh Lord, I could never repay such love

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I count the cost of what Jesus did for me I count the cost of what Jesus did for me at calvary I count the cost as He left His home in glory, redemption story just for me I count the cost as He left His throne on high, came down to die just for me.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: On Easter morning He rose from the grave Restoring access to the tree of life That since in Eden was taken away, but now it's given back to the bride The title deed has been restored Now we can look and live forever more!

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: I count the cost of what Jesus did for me I count the cost of what Jesus did for me at calvary I count the cost as He left His home in glory, redemption story just for me I count the cost as He left His throne on high, paid the perfect price for you and me

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Saints we're on our way to Glory land To the wedding supper of the Lamb It's a brand new day, for you and me.
